Non-binding term sheet — proposed strategic collaboration between Novalis Robotics Limited (SGX-ST mainboard issuer) and Shoreline Capital Partners Pte. Ltd.; governing law: Singapore.
Summary: potential subscription for new ordinary shares to fund automation expansion; valuation approach to reference publicly available VWAPs and an independent fairness opinion; financial amounts to be determined.
Stake sought: up to 19.9% of the enlarged share capital, subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals.
This outline is for discussion only and is not intended to be binding; for avoidance of doubt, no MAC/MAE condition is contemplated in this draft.
Public/stale reference: Novalis Robotics Limited announced its FY2024 audited results on SGXNet on 28 Feb 2025; this term sheet does not amend or supplement those disclosures.
Regulatory context: any transaction will comply with the SFA, the SGX Listing Manual (including Chapters 9 and 10 as relevant), and the Singapore Code on Take-overs and Mergers where applicable.
Disclosure: Rule 703 considerations and continuous disclosure obligations remain with the issuer; investor-relations mailbox ir@novalisrobotics.sg will coordinate any public queries.
Illustrative conditions precedent: shareholder approval if thresholds are triggered under the SGX Listing Manual; MAS approvals if any regulated activities are involved; confirmation of financing availability from the subscriber.
